# languageConstraints

**Instance Property**

Limits the set of possible languages that the recognizer will return.

## Declaration

```swift
var languageConstraints: [NLLanguage] { get set }
```

## Guiding the recognizer

- **languageHints**: A dictionary that maps languages to their probabilities in the language identification process.

items.description: A dictionary that maps languages to their probabilities in the language identification process.
